summary: Great June‑76 show with soaring Playin and Eyes jams captured on a solid audience tape
review: Fans rave about the high‑energy first set – US Blues, TMNS, Crazy Fingers and Comes A Time – and a dreamy second‑set sandwich of Playin > Drums > Wheel > Playin that builds into an incendiary Eyes>Dancin. The audience recording is generally clear with good crowd ambience, though a few listeners note it could be a touch brighter.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for the performance (mostly 5‑star) and mostly positive comments on sound quality lead to a strong combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear enough to enjoy the mix; crowd ambience is present, some reviewers wish for slightly better clarity but overall deemed listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set opens with high‑octane numbers that get the crowd moving, then eases into more relaxed jams before a second‑set sandwich of Playin/Drums/Wheel that builds to an explosive Eyes>Dancin finale.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Jerry's guitar work is highlighted as 'going crazy' on the Eyes>Dancin jam and throughout the extended Playin sequence.
